title: Molecular Biology and Genetics (English) Program Educational Objectives
content:
Molecular Biology and Genetics (English) Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To provide graduates with a strong foundation in the fundamental principles of Molecular Biology and Genetics.

2. To educate graduates who can design and conduct experiments, analyze results, and solve problems related to living organisms by applying knowledge in Molecular Biology and Genetics.

3. To educate graduates who can participate in or lead interdisciplinary research projects at national and international levels, and who possess teamwork, entrepreneurship, and foreign language communication skills.

4. To educate graduates who can analyze and solve problems encountered in technology and healthcare fields using knowledge of Molecular Biology and Genetics.

5. To educate individuals who can follow current developments in their field and continuously improve themselves.

6. To educate graduates who internalize universal and professional ethical values and responsibilities.
